zh.lifeSummary: 當Ferri de Lorraine於1217年出生在法國洛萊莫瑟勒薩雷明斯比其時，他的父親Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine43歲，母親Gertrude de Montmorency18歲。他於1243年之前與Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1295年在比利時海瑙特阿斯姆爾白可享年78歲，埋葬在比利時海瑙特阿斯姆爾白可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ferri de Lorraine于1217年出生在法国洛萊莫瑟勒薩雷明斯比其时，他的父亲Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine43岁，母亲Gertrude de Montmorency18岁。他于1243年之前与Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1295年在比利时海瑙特阿斯姆爾白可享年78岁，埋葬在比利时海瑙特阿斯姆爾白可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Ferri
meanings: Anglo-Norman: An Anglo-Norman form of Frederick.

en.lifeSummary: When Ferri de Lorraine was born in 1217, in Bitche, Sarreguemines, Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine, was 43 and his mother, Gertrude de Montmorency, was 18. He married Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville before 1243. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1295, in Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 78, and was buried in Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ferri de Lorraine est né en 1217, à Bitche, Sarreguemines, Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Montmorency, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville avant 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1295, à Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ferri de Lorraine 1217 in Bitche, Sarreguemines, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine 43 und seine Mutter Gertrude de Montmorency 18. Er hat vor 1243 Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1295 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Moulbaix, Ath, Hennegau, Belgien und wurde in Moulbaix, Ath, Hennegau, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ferri de Lorraine è nato il nel 1217 nel Bitche, Sarreguemines, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude de Montmorency, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville prima del 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1295, nel Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Ferri de Lorraineが1217年にフランスロレィヌモセルサレグエミンスビトチェで生まれた時，父Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraineは43歳，母Gertrude de Montmorencyは18歳であった。1243年以前にIsabelle de Maizey de Joinvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1295年にベルギーヘイナトアスモウルベイックスで78歳で死去し，ベルギーヘイナトアスモウルベイックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ferri de Lorraine(이)가 1217년 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 사르구민스 비트체에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude de Montmorency(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1243년 이전 Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1295년 벨기에 하인오트 앳h 모우베이스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 하인오트 앳h 모우베이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ferri de Lorraine nasceu em 1217, em Bitche, Sarreguemines, Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Montmorency, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville antes 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1295, em Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ferri de Lorraine родился в 1217 г. в местности бич, саррегуемаинесь, моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Montmorency, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville перед 1243 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1295 г. в местности моулбеикс, ат, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности моулбеикс, ат, ханаут, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ferri de Lorraine nació en 1217, en Bitche, Sarreguemines, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thierry"d'Enfer,du Diable" Duc de Lorraine, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Montmorency, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Isabelle de Maizey de Joinville antes de 1243. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1295, en Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Moulbaix, Ath, Hainaut, Bélgica.
